case_title: BARRIOS INVESTMENTS LLC VS. DAVID DE LEON

docket_entries.description: OVERPAYMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRIOS INVESTMENTS LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARRIOS INVESTMENTS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE LEON, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 907 VALENCIA STREET, #19, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY $1,440.00 RENT, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,740.00, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DE LEON, DAVID
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRIOS INVESTMENTS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DE LEON, DAVID SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
